title: TRIMET - 211info
text: TRIMET TRIMET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the metropolitan area mass transit program for the Portland metro area and information in regard to those services such as customer service, trip planning help, real time arrival information, and an outlet to report safety concerns. 101 SW Main Street Suite 700 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 238-7433 , , , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 238-7433 Customer Service, Transit Tracker, Safety, Trip Planning Text Short Code 27299 Text stop ID number for arrival times Transit Tracker Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Local Bus Services Public Transit Authorities Transit Customer Service Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - TRIMET LIFT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRIMET
